description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent gable roof and a large covered front porch supported by white columns. The facade features symmetrical window arrangements, including double-hung sash windows and a central front door. The property includes a detached garage, a driveway with a parked car, and a landscaped front yard with trimmed grass and flowering trees. At the rear, there is a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture and a swimming pool, surrounded by additional greenery and trees. The exterior walls are painted a light gray, complemented by white trim and a dark gray roof. The overall design reflects a blend of Colonial and Craftsman architectural elements, creating a welcoming and elegant residential appearance.
description: A two-story gray house with a gable roof, covered front porch, detached garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool. The design features symmetrical windows and classic architectural details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with white columns, central entryway, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, driveway with a car, and the side elevation of the house with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, outdoor furniture, and large windows overlooking the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and additional landscaping, with a clear view of the house's side profile.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, white columns, steps, and decorative trim
